title: Galactic Banking Network

{{Quote|Shortly the government was under new management and the Emperor's edicts rendered the Ministry of Ingress into a puppet of the Imperial Center military police. He also took sweeping steps to streamline what had become a hopelessly gridlocked economy, creating the Galactic Banking Network as a successor to the clearinghouse the Republic had used.|[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Gabrel Treon]], from "[[Tinker, Tailor, Soldier, Praji: A Cartel of Genes]]," published in the [[Byblos Journal of Historical Science]]|<ref name="Tinker" />}}
The '''Galactic Banking Network''',<ref name="Tinker" /> also known as the '''Imperial Banking Commission''',<ref name="GOA">''[[Graveyard of Alderaan]]''</ref> was established by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] shortly after the [[Declaration of a New Order]] as a successor to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] clearinghouse. It was an attempt to streamline the Republic's grid-locked economic institution.<ref name="Tinker" /> The Galactic Banking Network was a lending institution, and many individual [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] mortgaged their [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] through the organization.<ref name="SWS">''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]''</ref>
